channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Why aren't you holding BTC? — 78 replies — 312.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why aren't you holding BTC?

Open thread • Replies: 78 • Updated: 2026-06-26 14:36 UTC

OP

Too expensive? Prefer alts? Don't trust it? Or do you simply think there are better opportunities elsewhere?
Curious to hear your thoughts.

Early replies (first 3)

62395695
you can get better gains on stocks. those companies work for your money. btc sits there doing nothing but has the same risk profile as sharing a hobos needle without greater fools left to carry it to $200k

62395915
give me reasons to hold btc.

62395925
I am holding because I bought in 2020 before etfs now I refuse to sell because I'll get audit raped by the CRA supposedly so I'm stuck holding until it's got better tax laws or borrowing rates.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62409997
>>62409803
That's why I'm watching Babylon instead of blindly aping into random protocols. They've been taking audits and testing seriously.

62410003
>>62406014
People have gone broke waiting for the perfect entry just as often as they've bought too early.

62410039
>>62410003
So what's the best time to buy

62410525
>>62410039
everytime, imo.

62411160
>>62410525
I don't have money

62411213
>>62409997
I think their TBVs could unlock a lot of Bitcoin use cases that weren't really possible before. We'll know a lot more once the Aave V4 public testnet is complete tho.

62411224
>>62409051
Pls summary

62411241
>>62396002
What About gold and silver?

62411256
>>62404304
I'm not convinced .

62411265
I will just keep my 0.3 btc somewhere

62411638
>>62395915
Institutions are getting onboard, It might do 10X in a decade, also lending is starting to become more relevant with the likes of TBV, there are so many utilities untapped.

62412797
>>62411160
go to work

62413082
>>62411638
That's the part most people miss. BTC doesn't have to just sit in a wallet forever.

62413193
>>62406783
YOU'RE RETARD

62414853
>>62409813
Good idea

62414893
>>62395655
>Why aren't you holding BTC?
because there is this one nigger saylormoon who hold nearly a million of these, only boughted with debts & baggies hopes and dreams. MSTR alone was most of the buying pressure the past 2 years. What would the price look like to your opinion if it wasn't for Mike buying more than all the BTC mined worldwide each year?
We would already be back in the 15k range if it wasn't for him throwing infinite monies at BTC. And now his preferential dividend model is failing, do you really believe MSTR will be able to continue the purchase frenzy?
In just 6 months STRC went from 7 years worth of dividends to pay in their treasury down to 13 months. This boat is bleeding cash left and right.

62414918
>>62409051
Stolen from Sam Hyde

62414938
>>62414893
He knows what's he's doing

62414950
>>62413082
It won't work forever

62414955
>>62414944
How?

62415214
>>62414950
Hmmm, that's why it's still in public testnet instead of being pushed straight into production. I'm more interested in where it could lead than writing it off this early.

62415217
>>62414893
MSTR has definitely been a major buyer, but I don't think Bitcoin's entire value proposition depends on one company continuing to buy forever.

62415228
>>62395655
Because I have no brown, black or asian admixture.

62415296
>>62395655
Bitcorn has no liquidity now - there are no baggies left to trap.

I'd rather gamble on stocks - at least the price actually moves.

62415297
>>62396879
There is 'demand' for literally meme garbage like PEPE and DOGE which do nothing - not really an argument.

62415301
>>62415217
No, but MSTR collapse will cause a negative doom loop for Bitcorn if they have to start dumping.

62415492
>>62415228
Are you white?

62416132
>>62395655
I sold between 90-110k
Bought back between 59-64k
Still 1/3 of Tether left to buy further dips

62416334
>>62411213
Yeah. The Aegis partnership makes me even more interested to see how the TBV public testnet progresses.

62416338
>>62415301
but short term

item.title: >only down 4% from its ipo, which is very reasonable >now we know the price floor is $150 now is the time to buy SPCX — 25 replies — 100.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>only down 4% from its ipo, which is very reasonable >now we know the price floor is $150 now is the time to buy SPCX

Open thread • Replies: 25 • Updated: 2026-06-26 14:37 UTC

OP

>only down 4% from its ipo, which is very reasonable
>now we know the price floor is $150
now is the time to buy SPCX

Early replies (first 3)

62408493
>>62408480
Bagholder cope.

62408507
>>62408493
No cope saar only gains to be made! Please buy more stocks from this very profitable company! Time is limited for maximum gains must hurry before money train takes off!

62408519
>>62408480
>>only down 4% from its ipo,
kek about to 50% in 6 months

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62409551
>>62408480
>Has 9 days of data points.
>Yeah this is enough to predict the future.
Retards gonna retard.

62409673
>>62408480
t. Bought at 190 and panickingly trying to get others to hold his bags

62409699
>>62408480
Don't you realize 40% of the supply will be dumped in 2 months?

62409869
>>62408480
>buy my bags goy
no I don't think I will, I would consider buying stocks after the market corrects 50-75% from the current peak

62409872
>>62408480
IPO was $135

62409875
This is basically the perfect asset and the greatest IQ test in history. Ask yourself one question, do YOU want to fuck prostitutes on Mars?

62409882
>>62409875
id rather fuck them in my bedroom on earth. or my kitchen. or my living room...

62411812
>>62409551
>>62409673
>>62409699
>>62409872
150 is the floor

62411816
>>62408480
FLOOR BROS
WE'RE TESTING AGAIN

62411883
>>62409551
Yep. The insider shares haven't even been unlocked. Why is he in such a rush? Just wait. Massive supply coming in a couple of months. Michael Howell already says marginal liquidity in financial markets is lower.

Thus, SUPPLY++ & DEMAND??? = Likely lower price.

62414040
>>62408480
should I buy in now? I want to hold some before starship 13

62414121
>>62408480
with only 5% of the float available or w/e. holy shit yall are fucked when it opens up

62414137
>>62408480
Melon got re-bogged and fattened which he only does when things are going badly for him
2x short because of this

62414157
>>62408480
>We privatized NASA and now we want you to pay us to see Hollywood for scientists productions
Yeah, nah. I saw Kubrick admit to faking the moon landing.

62414178
>>62408480
There's genuinely not enough data to make a principled model of it. However the only thing not hypey about SpaceX is StarLink, which is a genuine business. Merging xAI into SpaceX however just tied a 1 ton ball and chain around it, because it's an insatiable blackhole of capex with no clear upside.

62415681
>>62414137
he was spending too much time being a master of POE2 instead of going to the gym. he'll get back on the horse.

62415707
This thread didn't age well.

62415715
>>62415707
$150 is still the floor. it'll be $300 by hanukkah

62415763
>>62411812
Holy baggie, this garbage isn't worth a fraction of what it is, why would your delusional number be even close to the floor

62416005
>>62408480
90x earnings is INSANE. Investing in this is a sure marker you are retarded and willful exit liquidity. Equivalent to buying Worldcomm with the exception that Space X probably has a longterm future, but is at absolute bubble top with an ABSURD valuation and no course to revenues in the near future, kept aloft by virtue of its multiple rules changed inclusion in indices receiving passive flows and retail hype that has come and gone.

62416247
>>62416005
>>62415763
it's already up for the day!

62416343
>>62416005
>Investing in this is a sure marker you are retarded and willful exit liquidity

while true, never underestimate the retardation of the retail masses

item.title: This motherfucker just proved to the entire world beyond any and all doubt, that absolutely NO ONE is trustworthy in cry… — 20 replies — 80.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
This motherfucker just proved to the entire world beyond any and all doubt, that absolutely NO ONE is trustworthy in cry…

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-06-26 14:35 UTC

OP

This motherfucker just proved to the entire world beyond any and all doubt, that absolutely NO ONE is trustworthy in crypto. Not a single goddamn one. ZERO exceptions

Early replies (first 3)

62410760
i mean he looks like a sojack, thats kind of on you

62413165
This, combined with fallout from the LINK AMA, is funny as hell. Assblaster was a fraud

62413241
>>62410743
Give context you nigger

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62413259
>>62413241
Yes, who is the onion and why do I care?>>62413165
>Assblaster was a fraud
This was always obvious

62413262
>>62413241
https://www.coinmetro.com/blog/announcement-onboarding-depositing-and-withdrawals
There are people in their telegram group talking about roping as a result of this. I'm not joking

62413573
>>62413262
So another exchange shutting down and stealing all users funds?

62414199
>>62413262
The ama was hard to watch. The amount of times he had to say he can't guarantee people's funds and that it's up to the courts was irritating. He kept saying they are all in it together and that he was too as in investor, ceo and user of the platform. I bet he didn't halt his own withdrawals though. What a fuckin goon on the whole "reorganization" pitch. Hopefully karma gets that stupid mother fucker. His body language said it all.

62414273
it's over. the sec need to be restored so it can go after every single piece of shit crypto project and exchange

62414281
>>62410743
>what if we had banks but like there we no rules about how the bankers behaved
Truly amazing how anyone thought this wasn't a scam.

62414293
>>62414281
Libertardian dream

62414317
>>62414199
>>62413262
Not your keys, not your crypto. Does remind me of last cycle when Kucoin closed up though. Hmm…

62414659
>>62410743

62414772
imagine trusting a man with a hairline like that? couldnt be me

62414835
>>62410743
My 1 whole btc is on there. I procrastinated putting it my own wallet. Are they scaming or we can get it back?

62414898
How the fuck does an exchange go bankrupt without a huge hack? Its like Trump bankrupting a casino. It should not happen

62414931
>>62410743
tfw a personal friend of mine for years started a crypto coin that actually took off when musk mentioned it a few years ago. it mooned and he sold all he held to pay off his house. black lives matter-tier scammer. you literally cannot trust anyone.

62415834
>>62410743
>NO ONE is trustworthy in crypto
No one is trustworthy. Cursed is the man who trusts in man.

62415841
Ver1zon hires the most pedophiles in the state of new jersey. Even with charges they keep their job touching kids that changes today.

62416152
>>62414317
True. As for Kucoin, I don't think they ever filed for chapter 11. They did cease operations in the US because I do remember them telling users to withdraw all of their holdings. Wasn't the fud around Tera Luna and Kucoin's supposed exposure to it? I think that was a rumor: https://www.kucoin.com/blog/be-aware-of-fud

62416320
>>62413262
>There are people in their telegram group talking about roping as a result of this. I'm not joking

item.title: 1 BTC = 1 BTC — 16 replies — 64.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
1 BTC = 1 BTC

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-06-26 14:28 UTC

OP

1 BTC = 1 BTC

Early replies (first 3)

62412737
1 BTC = 1000 Silver

62412801
>>62412603
thats someones son

62412943
>>62412603
>1 BTC = 1 BTC

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62412945
>>62412801
That's how he turned out this way

62413400
>>62413297
>posted it again
>commodities chad lol

62413490
>>62412603
I bagged my cousin a time or two nun wrong with it

62413493
1000 btc= 5 grams of cupronickel occasionally 6 grams
5oz of silver= 1 new minivan
5oz of gold = one 3bdrm house in soCal
Sorry not sorry thats just the way its going 2 be from here on out.

62413503
>>62412603
nothing is illegal if you dont get caught

62415116
>>62412801
obviously an extremely beautiful woman

62415219
>>62413490
Sweet home Alabama

62416030
>>62412603
>raped troon pushing to legalize the thing that caused him to troon which he fetishizes and ritualizes to cope

62416101
>>62415116
>adams apple
>hiding the hands

62416129
>>62415219
Actually hes a british pakistani.

62416279
>>62412801
Not anymore.

62416305
>>62412603
>neck tattoo
>tattoo near genitals
she's in deep pain

item.title: ITT WE LAUGH AT SILVERNIGGERS AHAHAHAHAHAHAAHAHAHAHAHAHAAHAHAHAHAHAHAAHAHAHAHAHAHAAHAHAHAHAHAHAAHAHAHAHAHAHAAHAHAHAHAHAH… — 72 replies — 41.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
ITT WE LAUGH AT SILVERNIGGERS AHAHAHAHAHAHAAHAHAHAHAHAHAAHAHAHAHAHAHAAHAHAHAHAHAHAAHAHAHAHAHAHAAHAHAHAHAHAHAAHAHAHAHAHAH…

Open thread • Replies: 72 • Updated: 2026-06-26 12:54 UTC

OP

ITT WE LAUGH AT SILVERNIGGERS 

Early replies (first 3)

62406474
>>62406449
Not selling.

62406483
>>62406474

62406488
>>62406474
Quiet jamboy. The colonizers are laughing at your "investment".

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62409027
>>62406449
I do love silver getting into slurping range

62409062
They bought silver because a rich indian proved its a scam,,,,,,lmao,,,,,,pol brain and investing is a deadly combination

62409141
>>62408105
lol N****r

62409263
KABOOOOOOOOOOOOOM SO BULLISH AT SILVER
SUPPLY SHOCK WHEN????

62409270
>>62409263
Theres a 54 billion ounce glut of silver

62409295
>>62409263
>SUPPLY SHOCK WHEN
Comex and Shanghai exchange inventories have been going up now for a solid month. Industry is thrifting silver and replacing it as much as possible with copper and in silver just being a rock it has no economic value really compared to gold.

62409326
>>62406449
What retard didn't sell once that shit shot past $100?

62409335
>>62409326
The ones spamming the catalog about how smart they were

62409381
>>62409326
Stackturds all claim silver is going to $2000.....bunch of losers

62409428
>>62406449
Just count the minutes before the next global crisis and precious metals go back up

62409431
>>62409428
Like the iran war and silver plummeted....lmao nothing dumber or broker than a stacktard

62409935
>>62409428
>global crisis
>silver just dumps
LMAO

62409962
>>62409428
Silver and gold dump dring a crisis loljust look at how they dumped harder than the stock market during the financial crisis.

62410278
>>62406587
Hodl silver hands

62410350
>>62406501
so why not just donate the money to charity then if you can never sell ?

62410373
>>62409326
Me.
t.stacktard

62410390
I'm still up on silver from inheriting my dad's coins a few months ago.

62410451
Bought a monster box in 2019 and another 200 oz over 2020-2021

Still up 3x

62410696
>>62410451
>Bought a monster box in 2019 and another 200 oz over 2020-2021
>Still up 3x
factually incorrect, at best you are up 2x in 7 years, not counting inflation
lol

62410726
>>62406474
HODL FELLOW APES
DIAMOND HANDS
TO DA MOOOOOOON!

62410762
silver will never lose it's true value unlike your stocks and shitcoins

62411945
>>62410762
what value, that you can put it in your asshole?

62412080
>>62407084
Imagine shitting silver.

62412276
Oh no, my 10oz bar I paid $130 for is now only worth $580, I’m so sad.

62412388
>>62406474
SHINY ROCKS

62415167
>>62412276
cope

62415205
>>62415167
dalit opinion

62415766
>>62410696
Haha what a loser with his huge unrealized gains. Wouldn't want to be him lol right

62415780
>>62406449
Peter Schiff said $70 was the bottom.
Peter Schiff was wrong again.

62415855
>>62409326
People who legitimately think the dollar is going to hyper inflate and when it does the government will be functional and allow silver to be converted to the price. A few of them seem to be smarter and are betting on the collapse and holding it because they are banking on silver being the new go to money in the post US government world because in the past silver was used. The people doing that are buying from mining companies now and not LE SILVER ENDS THE FED POSTING. They are actually doing the work to educate people on what a alt economy is offline.

item.title: Another stablecoin just RUGGED — 28 replies — 36.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Another stablecoin just RUGGED

Open thread • Replies: 28 • Updated: 2026-06-26 13:52 UTC

OP

MIM (Magic Internet Money) stablecoin just rugged.
So many stablecoins are rugging right now it's crazy

Early replies (first 3)

62408562
IT has just begun

62408566
magic internet money still exists?

62408598
>>62408557
amazing they're even still around

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62408623
Defi really is dead

62408804
>>62408566
It's an old ss

62408875
>>62408804
no it isn't, this happened today

62409989
>>62408557
Who?

62410014
>>62408557
Wow so stable

62411316
would pay $100 to watch an interview between caleb hammer and the largest magic internet money bagholder

62411344
>>62408557
That's when you know the bear is getting serious and there will be major dumps until we hit the bottom.

62414655
>>62408557
Last time I farmed this was almost a year ago, the APY would frequently go to zero and they would have to fucking manually approve more emissions via multisig kek. The writing was on the wall for a long time

Now they've deleted the discord server after rugging everyone

62414658
>>62414655
I'm actually amazed they were still running this and never caught any legal flak for the role they played in the terraluna ponzi scheme and collapse

62414664
this one MIGHT be a slurper
hold on

62414718
>>62414664
The shit people will buy instead of Bitcoin. Just lmfao. Sad really.

62414728
so depending on the collat that they start hiking rates on... this might re-peg
might

62414746
most likely won't re-peg
>reason:
their depreciated cauldrons is where most of the dogshit collat likely is
even if liquidated, they might not cover for a full repeg

62414751
>>62414664
Why would I want to repay my debt?

62414752
>>62414655
>manually approve more emissions via multisig
LMAO

62414758
>>62414751
dudes who borrowed from this might be better off letting liquidation happen than getting their dogshit collat back
only God knows what fuckery might be in the "depreciated cauldrons"

62414805
>>62414664
I will not be buying any but if you buy and it repairs, sell it the second it does.
>>62414718
>Buying bitcoin
Lmfao Buy real coins with actual utility.

62414828
>>62414805
I won't buy, this shit has thin liquidity
people might panic and send it to fractions of a cent just for the fuck of it
of course, at that point everyone is going to crowd and buy
but right now, it just looks like something went structurally wrong
and by what that guy posted, considering this shit is managed by fucking multisigs that put rates manually into the contracts...
it kinda does

62414831
>>62414805
>if you buy and it repairs

How’s the weather in Bangladesh?

62414841
>>62414831
Reread what I wrote retard. I said I will not buy it but encouraged him to not baghold the exit repeg if it happens because it never recovers and stays. You are so cooked by doom scrolling reels it is insane. You are incapable of reading a single sentence with patience for comprehension.

62414846
>>62414828
Maybe it will have a bounce somewhere along the line like UST did but do not bag hold it hoping for complete par recovery. Look at the LUNC generals in the archive if you want to feel the blood drain from your face imagining being them (and link is being outperformed by fucking LUNC, if you want to REALLY imagine being a bagholder of the deepest kind lol).

62414884
Why are you retards still in crypto??

62415000
>>62408557
usdc and tether can also depeg, then it's truly over
they can kill crypto at any time they want, wouldn't take more than the epstein class seizing circle and tether or their reserves
their buddies would all sell first, but this is a card they can and will play eventually if the goyim get too powerful and you will lose everything

62416138
>>62414841
>>62414846
Nice double post, yeah it takes about two seconds of reading your gibberish (which no one else will ever reply to because you’re brown and your opinion doesn’t matter) to tell you’re ESL as fuck and should GTFO

item.title: What the actual FUCK is this? — 24 replies — 24.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
What the actual FUCK is this?

Open thread • Replies: 24 • Updated: 2026-06-26 13:38 UTC

OP

What the actual FUCK is this?

Early replies (first 3)

62410973
>>62410915
Thank you for playing

62411210
They just did their AMA but banned any questions related to:

- The token
- Revenue
- Unlocks
- Buy backs
- The reserve
- Staking
- Timelines

They basically just responded to a bunch of questions like "We know Chainlink is the industry standard and already being adopted by major institutions but how can the community help"
Follow by answers like
"Talk to your friends and family to spread awareness, follow us on social media and share our posts"

It was just an excuse for them to ask holders to shill LINK to their family so they can get more liquidity to dump the 18 million tokens that unlocked for them this week

62411645
>>62411210
Buy our tokens so we can keep making these 'patnership' headlines that you read on secondary market (4chan)

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62411772
>>62410915
A visual representation of how Chainlink Labs is in fact ABOVE the chainlink TOKEN.
The link token will continue its downward trajectory into irrelevance

62411846
>>62411210
brutal.

t. i own 565 links tokwens

62411852
>>62411645
jesus fuking christ

62411855
>>62410973
i really did miss another bullrun didnt i .


i promise to god im selling it all next bull run when we hit 17 dollars, cant sell now... too late for that.

62412054
>>62411855
TNN

You really fell for a bunch of buzzwords and low tier shilling by schizophrenic baggies kek

62412075
>>62410915
Aaaaaaah it's over!!
I should have listened to the fuddies! I should have sold and bought xrp instead! Aaaaaaaaa!

62412108
>>62412054
yup i wasted 4 years of my life invesnting to get like 600 link tokens

62412114
>>62412075
And here we see a link marine being unable to comprehend that he and the xrp army are two faces of the same retarded coin.

62412123
>>62412114
Nooooo! I should have bought BTC! AAAAAAAAAA

62412174
>>62412123
No, you should continue to buy chainlink as it sinks to zero. Sergey really appreciates your donations.

62412690
>>62411210
>- The token
>- Revenue
>- Unlocks
>- Buy backs
>- The reserve
>- Staking
>- Timelines
Absolutely brvtal, jeetlinkers have been thoroughly raped.

62413749
while this might be true, i forbid you from selling

62413788
i feel like we dump maybe another 10%, but the bottom feels close

62413835
>>62413788
>but the bottom feels close

summer is always the worst time for markets and summer only just started

62413846
>>62413835
ever hear of defi summer?

62413973
>>62413846
>Chainlink summer of dreams

62413986
>>62413973

Stop...don't remind me

62414045
>>62411210
>fuddies pretending that some major thing or break from the usual poor comms is going to come out of a fuckin discord ama
Slow day in the fudcuck x gooner chat I'm guessing eh brownoids? Lmfao

62414156
>>62413973
I hate that this picture looks a lot like me. I wish I never fucking bought this coin.

62416065
>>62411210
Amazingly transparent retail liquidity milking findom scheme.
>>62414045
Do you even hear yourself or begin to consider what you're becoming or sacrificing for sake of defending this coin to signal consensus to the low IQ greed cult? Seriously, is it just self-hatred the way a gambler aspires to lose everything unconsciously? Why be like this or cope in this absurd of a way instead of just admitting you were wrong?

62416073
>>62411855
Try 1.70 dollars.

item.title: Day 1754 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M — 4 replies — 16.0/hr

Open thread • Replies: 4 • Updated: 2026-06-26 14:36 UTC

OP

you're going to have grandkids before bitcoin is at 1M

btc is a nigger coin

i boughted the fire sale

item.title: why do BTC fags call me brown for buying alts when dogecoin has outperformed bitcoin? — 10 replies — 15.5/hr

why do BTC fags call me brown for buying alts when dogecoin has outperformed bitcoin?

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-06-26 13:59 UTC

OP

why do BTC fags call me brown for buying alts when dogecoin has outperformed bitcoin?

Early replies (first 3)

62415059
>>62415046
Has it really?

62415170
>>62415046
I hold fucking 100k doge and bought it at 17% near ATH dont speak about doge Asshole!

62415189
>>62415046

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62415202
>>62415189
its never coming back, is it!

62415721
>>62415046
#dogearmy lives forever!

62415739
$1 DOGE IS INEVITABLE!!!!!!!

62415740
>>62415189
Cup and handle forming, btc is finished

62415753
>>62415046
because you are brown

62415759
I will buy bitcoin at the quarterly bottom of 20k level. Did you notice bitcoin moves with the general market now? Scam. Order flow doesnt mean anything.

62416173
>>62415046
a jeet created doge

item.title: Why does SPCX have such a hard floor at $150? — 19 replies — 13.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why does SPCX have such a hard floor at $150?

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-06-26 13:13 UTC

OP

Why does SPCX have such a hard floor at $150? Every time it gets under $151, like clockwork, someone buys

Early replies (first 3)

62412944
>>62412935
This has always been 100% a Man.

62413007
>>62412935
The person on this picture is transgender right? It has a penis right?

62413061
>>62412935
because vested interests require $150 to prop up a valuation of $1.5 trillion on a mountain of absolute fucking garbage.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62413074
>>62412944
>>62413007
No. Don't feel bad, many people have thought the same thing. Its not your fault tranners have gotten so hot over the past decade nce.

62413079
>>62412944
That man has the most fuckable face on internet.

62413083
>>62413074
This kid was like 2018

62413094
>>62412935
Those are the limit orders that didn't go through 2 weeks ago

62413098
>>62413094
Interesting, could you tell me more about that? So there are people who placed an order at $150 when it IPOd and then just left them there?

62413107
>>62413007
Uses her finger to penetrate

62413251
HIT OR MISS
I GUESS THEY NEVER MISS HUH?

62413351
>>62413098
>So there are people who placed an order at $150 when it IPOd and then just left them there?
Yes.

62413472
>>62413061
Possibly. But more likely it's >>62413094

62413536
So much tranny propaganda and trolls online that I never realized if OP pic is a man with a wig or a real qt pie woman.
TL:DR is that a man or not?

62413639
>>62413251
YOU GOT A BOYFRIEND, I BET HE DOESNT KISS YA
MUAH
I miss 2018

62413642
>>62413536
It’s a genuine woman. Though her hair looks like a wig, I will admit.

62414159
>>62413639
You'll say the same thing about 2026 when someone says 6-7 in 2035

62414373
>>62412935
Hey better than schwab
I heard my uncle saying earlier his broker bought that shit at $210 a share lol.

62414420
>>62412935
I recognize this girl from a /pol/ post...

FOUND IT

(see picrel)

62415943
>>62414420
The way I see it phrased that I adore is that liberals went from "If Trump is elected then there will be another holocaust where he kills all the Jews!" to "Zion Don keeps sucking schlomo cock and six million wasn't enough"
And it wasn't even a decade

item.title: HOLY SHIT JUST PUMP SO I CAN SELL EVERYTHING AND QUIT I AM NEVER EVER *EVER* GONNA TOUCH YOU AGAIN fucking hell this ain… — 16 replies — 12.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
HOLY SHIT JUST PUMP SO I CAN SELL EVERYTHING AND QUIT I AM NEVER EVER *EVER* GONNA TOUCH YOU AGAIN fucking hell this ain…

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-06-26 13:22 UTC

OP

HOLY SHIT JUST PUMP SO I CAN SELL EVERYTHING AND QUIT
I AM NEVER EVER *EVER* GONNA TOUCH YOU AGAIN

fucking hell this ain't for me. I should've put my money somewhere else. this crypto shit moves too fast. I could've sold at 82k, hell, I even predicted that it was gonna go up when I bought at 75k, but shit happened and I forgot to sell.

it's so stupid.

I just wanna put my money somewhere I don't need to look every goddamn day and not get my anus financially and economically prolapsed. I just don't want idle money. is that too much to ask?

I heard good things on ETFs, are they as hassle-free as they sound? it sounds more stable than this shit

Early replies (first 3)

62414803
>>62414756
there is no "just pump" you dumb nigger the money you lost is gone and you're going to watch the rest go away too because you can't handle taking an L

62414815
>>62414803
no, I'm gonna wait it out because that's the only thing I can do. no point in selling on a loss

62414816
>>62414756
nigger dont fucking touch it. bottom seller

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62414832
>>62414756
sell it all
to me
at a discount
never look back

62414852
>>62414756
Just sell. Cash out your gains today and dont look back. Invest in broad index fund ETFs

62414879
>>62414756
Diversify you dumb nigger. I have 150k in BTC and 1.3mil in S&P 500. If BTC drops 50% I barely notice

62414885
>>62414815
>no point in selling on a loss
>t. literally every bagholder in the history of bagholding to zero

62415692
>>62414756
You should have sold the last time it pumped, chud.

62415700
>>62414885
kek this

62415775
>>62414852
Sell one bubble at the bottom to buy another one at its high?

62415789
>>62415775

Are you sure this is the bottom though?

62415912
>>62414879
If btc gives up 2x you'd also kind of barely notice. I think its just these people want to get rich fast but we are way past that stage.

Meanwhile I get a half chub thinking about how my 500k in the s&p at worst goes up 5% every year (we have had a good decade though)

62415954
kek

62415962
>>62414756
If it pumps you won't sell, you'll wait for it to go higher and it will dump even lower

62415975
>>62415962
This

62415982
>>62415962
The tale of the average baggie.
>Coin dumps
"Eh I'll hold. No point selling at a loss."
>Coin pumps
"Eh I'll hold. It will pump even higher and THEN I'll sell."

OP

Am I retard or not

Early replies (first 3)

62414901
>>62414896
you're retardmaxxing and that's based

62414904
>>62414896

62414915
>>62414904

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62414919
>>62414896
kospi is on freefall right now i can guarantee it will spill over to here. so yeah you really fucked up

62414920
dawg just buy btc

62414923
>>62414915
https://youtu.be/a3-J7TGcHS4?t=59

62414924
>>62414915
yeah yeah, we all know how to edit screenshots

62414927
>>62414915
retard.

62415055
>>62414896
why mstr instead of mstx? btc moves so slowly why not get your worth out of it

62415914
>>62414896
Not retarded, but you will probably be red before it goes green, its going to be a ride where the demoralizes and doomers are going to be non stop fudding bitcoins demise...

item.title: I have a HSA and let my medical bills go to collections — 7 replies — 4.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
I have a HSA and let my medical bills go to collections

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-06-26 13:09 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62414065
>>62414058
giga based, i've only ever paid med bills through collections but even then i only pay like half the time

62414072
>>62414058
Good move. You are actively managing your financial health and physical health at the same time

62414077
>>62414058
depends where you live

your best bet is to get on medicaid because if you have income or assets and don't pay your bills they'll take the income and assets eventually

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62414094
>>62414077
The fuck schlomo gon do

62415847
>>62414058
Based
Absolutely based

62415864
>>62414094
>>62414077
>they'll take the income and assets
wish i could see the melty when you face justice, freeloading faggot

62415927
>>62415864
They won't bother unless the debt is high 5 figs or above. Getting a lawyer involved costs thousands in initial fees and taking that case to court will cost tens of thousands alone. People just jump around EDs and UCs and repeat every couple of years to minimize the impact.
